metadata.purpose: Machine-readable worldbuilding and story context for game/system coding

magic_system.core_principle: Magic is the fundamental building block of all matter and energy.

rules.conservation: Magic cannot be created or destroyed, only changed in form.
rules.composition: All matter is composed of quantum-like magic atoms.
rules.environmental_interaction: Climate determines biome type; mana density determines biome intensity and instability.

states.name: elemental
states.description: Common magic influenced by environment or intent into forms like fire, water, wind, and earth.

states.name: pure_white
states.description: Pre-elemental raw magic with higher potency and harder control.

states.name: quantum
states.description: Foundational state of magic governing reality consistency and timeline stability.

requirements: Specific activation method (poem, rune, circle, or equivalent key)
rules: Only the user and directly affected targets are displaced

mana_system.depletion_effect: Magic fatigue when all three pools are depleted.
mana_system.overuse_effect: Body absorbs environmental magic, causing burning, aging, and possible death.

humans.method: Tool-based magic using Ether Resin and spell circles
notes: Blood circles are archaic and illegal
Non-mages can use inscribed circles on weapons/armor

elves.method: Language-based magic through poems, phrases, and structured words

orcs.method: Rune-based magic through fixed combinations and magical instructions

beastmen.method: Emotion-based magic used for self-enhancement and body augmentation

dragons.method: Natural use of pure white magic as an extension of pure mana souls

environmental_effects.rule: Natural weather + sufficient mana density = amplified biome-specific phenomena

human_magic_infrastructure.ether_resin: Manufactured magical substance used in wands and staffs to draw spell circles.

magic_recyclers.function: Absorb excess ambient mana and condense it into Mana Water.
magic_recyclers.purpose: Prevent urban magical instability and convert ambient mana into usable potions.
magic_recyclers.failure_condition: If overloaded, unstable magical phenomena can occur even in cities.

rules: Magical devices must be approved, licensed, and registered
Illegal experimentation is common among students and underground artificers

biology.core_principle: All living organisms are composed of magic atoms; biology and magic are inseparable.

adaptation.rule: Creatures adapt rapidly to environment and mana exposure, creating subspecies rather than random mutation.
adaptation.example: A normal Brumel can become a desert Brumel within about one month in desert conditions.

reproduction.rule: The child becomes one full race based on gene dominance rather than a mixed hybrid.
reproduction.dragon_note: Dragons can reproduce in humanoid form if strong enough to maintain it.

intelligence.rule: Intelligence is not determined by race or magical ability.
intelligence.note: All races produce brilliant individuals, foolish individuals, gifted mages, and gifted scientists.

limb_regrowth.requirements: High skill healing/cleric magic with strong focus and precise matter reshaping

permanent_species_change.dragon_exception: Dragons can temporarily shift between reptilian and humanoid forms while actively maintaining shape.

become_dragon.exception: Only possible by direct divine intervention from the Highest Order in the throne room.

natural_immortality.exceptions: Requires external help such as Death Dragon or soul-transfer systems

create_life.note: Golems and familiars may be created, but they act as extensions of a caster’s intent/emotion rather than true self-aware beings.

soul_body_relationship.rule: Soul is stronger than body; stronger souls dominate weaker ones.
soul_body_relationship.special_case_oren: Jötunn's stronger dragon soul is constrained by a Severance curse that binds him to Oren's heart and enforces human limits and stable human control while Oren is awake.

M.name: Misfortune
M.description: Moderate intelligence, reactive strategy, pack behavior

D.name: Disaster
D.description: High intelligence, capable of planning and territorial strategy

C.name: Calamity
C.description: Highest non-divine threat tier; dragon level. No sublevels above this.

flora.core_rule: Plants form the base of all ecosystems and are shaped first by climate, then amplified by mana density.

karva.trait: statue-still waiting followed by explosive pressure pounce

veyrith.trait: air-shear dive through thermals and mana-rich wind

thalgrim.trait: moves with minimal wake via current silence

general_intelligence.low_tier_creatures: Low consciousness, easy to trick, mostly instinctive
general_intelligence.high_tier_creatures: Some high-tier creatures may have child-level or higher strategic intelligence

geography.biome_distribution_rule: Biome placement is determined by climate and terrain elevation, while mana density amplifies biome behavior.

instability_zones.description: High mana density disrupts natural environmental balance, creating volatile or dangerous terrain.

highest_order.summary: Dominant organized human faith centered on a single supreme balancer.

institutions.leadership: royal family above the church; bishops and clergy beneath them

origin.jyra: A living rib-fragment of the Highest Order sent to aid humanity during dragon oppression.
origin.founding: Jyra led the revolt, became first queen, and established the religion.

royal_line.arthur: Dragon of Healing Light, husband of Jyra, still alive and hidden beneath the throne room.
royal_line.descendants: Human royal family descends from Jyra and Arthur.

doctrine: The Highest Order is a balancer
Good returns good; evil invites punishment
highest_order.public_afterlife_belief: The honorable become astrals and dwell in the Highest Order’s heavenly realm.

mother_mana.summary: Animist faith treating all magic as a shared living consciousness.
beliefs: All magic is one living consciousness called Mother Mana
Souls return to Mother Mana after death
Strong enough communion can reach past loved ones
mother_mana.hidden_truth: Such contact is actually a temporary emotional link to souls in the afterrealm.

dragon_worship.summary: Faith that dragons are the highest order and the old world under them was closest to heaven and earth united.
beliefs: Devotion and willpower can shape rebirth
Followers may be reborn into dragons or higher forms
The past dragon age was a golden age

scientific_view.dravrah: Neutral to religion and studies mana as a purely scientific/quantum system.
scientific_view.dwarves: Similar to Dravrah; practical, scientific, non-spiritual view of magic

public_afterlife_beliefs.common_endless_sleep: Many ordinary people believe death is simply blackness, nothingness, and unawareness.
public_afterlife_beliefs.highest_order_belief: Ascension to a heavenly plane with the Highest Order
public_afterlife_beliefs.mother_mana_belief: Return to a universal magical consciousness
public_afterlife_beliefs.dragon_belief: Reformation through will and mana field into a higher next life

heresy.rule: Each religion considers belief in the others heretical; the world is broadly xenophobic in religion.
heresy.exception: The Severance is the major organized exception outside orthodox faith

known_holy_sites.crater_of_jyra: Holy site marking where Jyra descended to the world

true_process: Memory and identity begin to fade

core_rules.souls_in_overworld: Ghosts are projections from the afterrealm and cannot be physically or magically touched from the overworld.
core_rules.same_realm_interaction: Souls can be interacted with by beings in the afterrealm.

death_dragon.role: Ruler of the afterrealm and manager of soul flow/rebirth
abilities: preserve memory and identity with magical coating
allow living beings to survive temporarily in the afterrealm

preservation_deals.nature: Loose personal judgment rather than formal contracts
criteria: lived a life with little to no murder
strong emotional desire to remain oneself
actions that reduced death or suffering
costs: cannot return to same time period
world moves on while soul is in the afterrealm

time_dilation.rule: Time in the afterrealm runs much faster than in the overworld.
time_dilation.example: About 10 minutes in the afterrealm can equal about 1 year in the overworld.

legendary_returned_mage.description: Ancient human elder of Dravrah with memory-preserved rebirth cycle granted by Death Dragon.
rebirth_loop: skips the line to Death Dragon
is reborn roughly one year later in the overworld
limits: must age and physically redevelop power
retains full memory but not full body capability

acerima.type: Human kingdom with fantasy US-like federal structure
governance: capital controls strategic law and resources
provinces act like states controlling local land and towns

cac.name: Crown Artifice Council
cac.student_conflict: College and school students often build illegal devices due to slow approvals.

dravrah_and_taa.dravrah: Neutral academic center focused on magic as science

taa.name: Tower Access Authority
taa.control: Overseen by the Elder Council of Dravrah
function: issue Trailblazer requests to restore failed paths

trailblazers.definition: Requests/contracts to restore broken route checkpoints by manual dangerous travel and repair.

severance.type: Hidden organization seeking reality-shaping ends through forbidden magic

drysk.description: Reptilian humanoid race once acting as dragon-adjacent nobility and intermediaries.
history: served dragons as nobles and enforcers before the revolt
many chose to be sealed with dragons
survivors became outcasts and shadow manipulators
drysk.current_role: Hidden backbone of dragon restorationist influence within the Severance

process: body physically carried through stabilized magical current
rules: Frequent travel causes mana burn through skin pores and overload of mana pools
tower_system.checkpoints: Required to stabilize the beam across long distances and dangerous terrain.

ancient_history.dragon_age: Dragons ruled as divine beings; Drysk acted as noble intermediaries over lower races.
ancient_history.revolt: Lower races revolted with Jyra and Arthur’s help, leading to the sealing of dragons.
ancient_history.seal_note: Early seal was immature; dragons could sometimes escape thousands of years ago.

jyra.origin: Rib-fragment daughter of the Highest Order
jyra.role: Led the human revolt and became first queen of Acerima
jyra.later: Returned to the Highest Order’s realm

arthur.title: Dragon of Healing Light
arthur.role: Helped the revolt, married Jyra, remains alive in secret beneath the throne

oren.original_form: Human Oren carrying Jötunn, a dragon soul originally searching for an artifact stolen by Severence
defeat_event: Jötunn attacked Severence headquarters to retrieve artifact
Jötunn was defeated by combined Severence forces

curse.intent: Assassination via soul displacement into a vulnerable human infant
method: Jötunn's dragon soul ripped from regenerative dragon body
forcibly placed into the heart of a human baby boy named Oren
bound to Oren's heart with a curse tattoo
curse.plan: Kill Oren's body to kill both Oren and Jötunn permanently
curse.result: Oren escaped as a baby by unknown means

souls: Human Oren (original soul of the baby)
current_state.body_rule: If Oren's body dies, both souls die because Jötunn is bound to Oren's heartbeat.
current_state.control_rule: Oren normally controls the body; Jötunn may surface when Oren is unconscious.

goals.human_oren: Wants freedom, answers, and eventually revenge
goals.jotunn: Wants freedom from Oren's heart and return to his dragon body
goals.death_mage: Wants to find Oren and finish the failed kill against Jötunn

time_dragon.role: Brother of Death Dragon; only true master of time magic
abilities: holds knowledge of all temporal keys

death_dragon.role: Sister of Time Dragon; ruler of the afterrealm

death_mage.role: Severance soul mage obsessed with Death Dragon
abilities: observe the afterrealm by reverse-ghost-like projection
host suppression or host soul severance

returned_legend_mage.role: Dravrah elder, friend of Time Dragon and Death Dragon, future second teacher of Oren
traits: rumored to use pure white magic
abilities: passage in and out of Death Dragon’s realm
extreme magical talent even in human lineage

fantasia.type: Global entertainment and competition island near Dravrah
purpose: gives people a reason to travel across kingdoms
allows poor but gifted competitors to rise in status
creates global magical competition and betting culture
fantasia.entry_rule: No entry fee; only need a way to reach Fantasia
